atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports left arm pain.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports left arm pain that began approximately two weeks ago.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports the left arm pain is worsening at night.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports the pain initially arose suddenly.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports a feeling of discomfort with the left arm pain.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports the pain is now more persistent.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports the pain is a dull ache.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports the pain is exacerbated by certain movements.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports similar symptoms in the past.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports the past symptoms were attributed to a pinched nerve.

atomic_propositions.speaker: unknown
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient is taking gabapentin as prescribed.

atomic_propositions.speaker: unknown
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient is taking eliquis as prescribed.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient denies any recent trauma or injury to the arm.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Physical exam reveals mild tenderness to palpation in the cervical region.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient's symptoms are most likely due to cervical radiculopathy

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Peripheral neuropathy is also a consideration

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient will continue with gabapentin as prescribed

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: I am ordering a cervical MRI

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: We will also schedule a left C7-T1 epidural

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient will follow up in four weeks
